title: podman-py doesn't support pull policy like the podman cli go binary does
body:
When calling the podman-py code to start a container we can't specify the pull policy. But when we run this via the podman cli it has a command line option https://docs.podman.io/en/v5.0.1/markdown/podman-run.1.html#pull-policy to specify the pull policy.
For parity we would like to have the same functionality be available in podman-py as in podman cli.

comments.body: @mkanoor please test the code in the linked pr if you can. I think the fix should be enough :D
